insight_summary: More people are talking about English right now. Lead with a clear opinion before the conversation gets crowded.

next_post.hook: Why are younger Brits starting to disconnect from what people really think about english right now?
next_post.content_idea: Tell one short story that shows how English shows up in pubs, schools, or family chats — keep it under 30 seconds before the punchline.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into debate, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
